question: Data is part of the input in reinforcement learning.
In supervised learning, the model is trained with the correct answer.
The best solution in reinforcement learning is decided based on the minimum reward.
Reinforcement learning is a good technique for systems that need to make a lot of small decisions without human guidance.
One advantage of reinforcement learning is that it is easy to debug and interpret.
Reinforcement learning can handle non-deterministic environments.
CNN architectures assume the input is in the form of structured data.
The convolution operation increases the number of free parameters in a neural network.
A very high number of neurons is necessary if we apply a fully connected network to images.
Max pooling uses the average value from each of a cluster of neurons.
All CNN models are trained on the ImageNet dataset.
In a CNN, the activation function is applied before the convolution operation.
The stride in a convolutional layer determines the step size of the filter.
Zero padding is a common technique used to control the output size in a convolutional layer.
ReLU is an activation function that eliminates positive values.
The purpose of the flattening operation is to convert the multi-dimensional feature maps into a single vector.
The output of the SoftMax layer is a vector where the sum of its elements is 0.
Reinforcement learning is preferable for solving simple problems.
The training data in reinforcement learning is obtained via the direct interaction of the agent with the environment.
The fully connected layer is responsible for feature extraction in a CNN.
